epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Diagnosis based on spirometry showing post-bronchodilator FEV1/FVC < 0.70, with symptoms of dyspnea, cough, and sputum production.

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Aligned with GOLD guidelines (Global Initiative for Chronic Obstructive Lung Disease)
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Inhaled bronchodilators, corticosteroids, pulmonary rehabilitation, smoking cessation programs
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Disparities in access across Eastern and Western EU countries, aging population increasing burden
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong research networks via ERS, integrated care models in Nordic countries
